entries.title: Built-in synthetic IPL and XDF
entries.notes: Self-authored public software generated in-browser. Validates CPU execution, CRTC raster IRQ, GVRAM/TVRAM/sprite composition, HD63450 DMA, FDC/XDF, SASI or internal SCSI/HDF, YM2151, MSM6258, MIDI and the render path without copyrighted assets.

entries.title: Cho Ren Sha 68K ver1.10
entries.notes: Manual regression for SHA-256 6d8169ef89654fd7986b65eecfb5444dc496ac8e2f888b385a6b531ea3ef2146. With 4 MiB RAM it boots past the fixed-buffer/main-memory checks into gameplay, renders the player/background layers at 256x256, and produces deterministic non-silent PCM (observed peak 0.514167). The disk image is never committed.

entries.title: 男弾 ver1.00
entries.notes: Manual regression for SHA-256 62630c749e9ab81a8963f8cb60a80d11e1ed8998404e2ab572a54b4c34cbda74. The .2HD raw image boots with 12 MiB RAM, DSHELL launches GAME.BAT, the 256x256 title layers render, and non-silent PCM is generated (observed peak 0.394531). The disk image is never committed.
